name: Grant Fund
description: Fund sourced from an external grant agreement. Requires a linked Grant record.

name: Campaign Fund
description: Fund raised through a fundraising campaign.

name: Unrestricted Fund
description: General operating funds with no donor-imposed restrictions.

name: Business Surplus Fund
description: Surplus generated from business/social enterprise activities.

name: Reserve Fund
description: Board-designated reserve for emergency or strategic use.

name: Co-funding Fund
description: Fund contributed jointly by multiple donors or matching partners.

name: Bridging Fund
description: Temporary talangan fund to cover expenses pending reimbursement.

name: Board-designated Fund
description: Fund set aside by board resolution for a specific purpose.
